amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 70 — paragraph 1 — introductory part
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 70 — paragraph 1 — introductory part

## Text proposed by the Commission

1. National competent authorities and notified bodies involved in the application of this Regulation shall respect the confidentiality of information and data obtained in carrying out their tasks and activities in such a manner as to protect, in particular:

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1. The Commission, national competent authorities and notified bodies , the AI Office and any other natural or legal person involved in the application of this Regulation shall respect the confidentiality of information and data obtained in carrying out their tasks and activities in such a manner as to protect, in particular;
commission_text: 1. National competent authorities and notified bodies involved in the application of this Regulation shall respect the confidentiality of information and data obtained in carrying out their tasks and activities in such a manner as to protect, in particular:
parliament_text: 1. The Commission, national competent authorities and notified bodies , the AI Office and any other natural or legal person involved in the application of this Regulation shall respect the confidentiality of information and data obtained in carrying out their tasks and activities in such a manner as to protect, in particular;
